title: Integrating Safety Culture into Business Management
description: A flowchart illustrating how core business management strategies drive and sustain a human-centred AI safety culture.
relationships: Leadership Commitment establishes the Policy & Governance Framework, which mandates Risk Assessment Processes and funds Training & Competency Development. These processes feed into Transparent Reporting Systems, whose outputs inform a Continuous Improvement Loop that cycles back to update the Leadership Commitment and Policy.
